category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison - China export to Grenada.

title.en: China-to-Grenada EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入格林纳达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入格瑞那達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Grenada GDBS / PURC / GRENLEC requirements, 230/400 V 50 Hz grid conditions, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 61000 EMC, OCPP interoperability, hurricane and salt-mist derating, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与格林纳达GDBS / PURC / GRENLEC要求、230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 61000电磁兼容、OCPP互操作、飓风和盐雾降额，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與格瑞那達GDBS / PURC / GRENLEC要求、230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 61000電磁兼容、OCPP互操作、颶風和鹽霧降額，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Grenada, the practical gaps are grid-voltage confirmation, IEC connector localisation, IEC safety and EMC evidence, and site approval with the utility and regulator. Grenada uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz electricity system, while China domestic chargers are commonly documented around 220/380 V, 50 Hz; frequency is the same, but nominal voltage differs and input range, protection, metering, and thermal ratings must be confirmed. Grenada's UK/IEC legacy points toward IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, not the Americas J1772 / CCS1 ecosystem. GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 DC communication are physically and protocol incompatible. The local EV market is essentially non-existent or very early-stage, so exporters should treat each shipment as a project-specific GDBS / PURC / GRENLEC review, with added hurricane, salt-mist, and sea-freight packaging controls for St George's import logistics.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入格林纳达时，实务差距在于电网电压确认、IEC接口本地化、IEC安全和电磁兼容证据，以及与公用事业公司和监管机构的场站审批。格林纳达采用230/400 V、50 Hz电力系统，而中国国内充电桩通常按220/380 V、50 Hz形成文件；频率相同，但标称电压不同，须确认输入范围、保护、计量和热额定值。格林纳达的英国/IEC传统指向交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2，而不是美洲J1772 / CCS1体系。GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通信在物理和协议上不兼容。当地电动汽车市场基本不存在或仍处极早期，因此出口商应将每批货视为特定项目的GDBS / PURC / GRENLEC审查，并增加针对圣乔治港进口物流的飓风、盐雾和海运包装控制。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入格瑞那達時，實務差距在於電網電壓確認、IEC接口本地化、IEC安全和電磁兼容證據，以及與公用事業公司和監管機構的場站審批。格瑞那達採用230/400 V、50 Hz電力系統，而中國國內充電樁通常按220/380 V、50 Hz形成文件；頻率相同，但標稱電壓不同，須確認輸入範圍、保護、計量和熱額定值。格瑞那達的英國/IEC傳統指向交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2，而不是美洲J1772 / CCS1體系。GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通訊在物理和協議上不兼容。當地電動汽車市場基本不存在或仍處極早期，因此出口商應將每批貨視為特定項目的GDBS / PURC / GRENLEC審查，並增加針對聖喬治港進口物流的颶風、鹽霧和海運包裝控制。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GDBS scope determination, PURC approval, GRENLEC grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Grenada standards, utility requirements, electrical-installation rules, import requirements, and applicable IEC editions with qualified professionals and the relevant authorities before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GDBS适用范围裁定、PURC批准、GRENLEC并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士及相关主管部门核验格林纳达现行标准、公用事业要求、电气安装规则、进口要求及适用IEC版本。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GDBS適用範圍裁定、PURC批准、GRENLEC併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士及相關主管部門核驗格瑞那達現行標準、公用事業要求、電氣安裝規則、進口要求及適用IEC版本。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
